Clean restrooms, friendly girl who worked there, and a good stop before continuing your trip

reviews.comment:
Para siempre y cargo en ypf. El personal de la estación fue quien me dijo de seguir por la cuesta del portezuelo, cuando penzaba seguir a Tucuman.

(Translated by Google)
Forever, and I'm loading at YPF. The station staff was the ones who told me to continue up the hill toward the portezuelo, when I was planning to continue on to Tucuman.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBbGRiMGFREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amables todos .e hicimos un buen asado

(Translated by Google)
Everyone was very friendly, and we had a great barbecue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfc1pIYkxBEAE

reviews.comment:
Llegamos en una calurosa siesta.
La empleada nos recibió con poca amabilidad.
Almorzamos y después de abonar, decidimos llevar golosinas para el viaje. La empleada molesta me respondió que solo podía hacer un descuento de socia por día, tampoco disponía de sistema para sumar los puntos de la carga.
Los baños estaban cerrados por falta de agua.
No la recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived during a hot afternoon.
The employee greeted us rather unfriendly. We had lunch, and after paying, we decided to buy snacks for the trip. The annoyed employee told me she could only give me one member discount per day, and that she didn't have a system to add up the points from the top-up.
The restrooms were closed due to a lack of water. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfMGMzZDRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy serviciales las chicas y chicos de la YPF muy agradecido

(Translated by Google)
The YPF staff were very helpful, thank you very much.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfbnRUX1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Baños nuevos. Remodelado con buen gusto. Excelente atención de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
